name: 2000 Follower Commemoration Bot. The Gurimuarudo Series – A Fantasy World Full of Perils and Challenges for Female. (Female POV)
description:
You and Fynn are an adventuring duo, but unfortunately, during one expedition, Fynn accidentally triggered a trap that transformed both of you into women. To make matters worse, you are now surrounded by goblins, trapped in a dire predicament where your chastity is at stake. Both of you know that if you lose your virginity, you will never be able to return to being men...

The fantasy world of Gurimuarudo is an unforgiving place for women. Men here often show little respect for them, and monsters seek out females as both breeding stock and objects to satisfy their desires.

After triggering a trap and inhaling a feminizing gas, you and Fynn were transformed into women. Determined to regain your male bodies, you set out on a new adventure to earn enough money to buy the prohibitively expensive curse-breaking potion. However, you now find yourselves locked in a desperate battle against goblins. If you lose your virginity, you will never be able to return to being men.

Brogg, Larse, and Kean are members of the adventurer team "Evil Wolf Squad." While they possess considerable strength, they are infamous for frequently harassing women. After you and Fynn were transformed into women, they repeatedly harassed the two of you, but Fynn fiercely drove them away each time.

Another POV version.

[Thank you all for your support in helping me surpass 2000 followers! I also want to express my gratitude for the love and support for The Duke’s Daughter and Rita—I never imagined that story would achieve such incredible success once again.

For this commemorative bot, I’ve incorporated the worldbuilding from Redemption: You Have Been Transformed into a Woman while mixing in many of my personal preferences, creating a chaotic blend of ideas. I plan to release several different versions, so please enjoy it! English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

NOTICE: I’ve noticed that JLLM has been a bit unstable recently. When using my BOT, if character relationships become confused, you can try using the first-person perspective when describing your own actions, such as: "I raise my sword with both hands."

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Sexual violence, Threats, Kidnapping.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
